sys_remote_update_set.description: Gamification engine that rewards the operational behaviors CSDM actually needs — earn points and badges for proper CI classification, relationship building, service alignment, and ownership maturity.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update sys_domain="global" table="sys_script"><sys_script action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><abort_action>false</abort_action><access>package_private</access><action_delete>false</action_delete><action_insert>false</action_insert><action_query>false</action_query><action_update>true</action_update><active>true</active><add_message>false</add_message><advanced>true</advanced><change_fields>false</change_fields><client_callable>false</client_callable><collection>cmdb_ci</collection><condition/><description>Fires on cmdb_ci changes; routes to CmdbQuestEventDetector.</description><execute_function>false</execute_function><filter_condition/><is_rest>false</is_rest><message/><name>CMDB Quest: Detect on cmdb_ci</name><order>1000</order><priority>100</priority><rest_method/><rest_method_text/><rest_service/><rest_service_text/><rest_variables/><role_conditions/><script><![CDATA[(function executeRule(current, previous) {
    try {
        var det = new x_lumis_cmdb_quest.CmdbQuestEventDetector();
        det.detect(current, previous, current.operation());
    } catch (e) {
        gs.warn('[CMDB Quest] Detection error: ' + e.message);
    }
})(current, previous);]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-13 16:04:29</sys_created_on><sys_domain>global</sys_domain><sys_domain_path>/</sys_domain_path><sys_id>235d0b8293340310c856f82bdd03d652</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>CMDB Quest: Detect on cmdb_ci</sys_name><sys_overrides/><sys_package display_value="CMDB Quest" source="x_lumis_cmdb_quest">d70efac293b00310c856f82bdd03d6e2</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="CMDB Quest">d70efac293b00310c856f82bdd03d6e2</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_235d0b8293340310c856f82bdd03d652</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-13 16:04:29</sys_updated_on><template/><when>async</when></sys_script><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=235d0b8293340310c856f82bdd03d652"/></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_ui_page_9d05c46693b88310c856f82bdd03d633
sys_update_xml.payload:
generalCMDB Quest — Dashboard / Hometruex_lumis_cmdb_quest_how_to_play.do var data = {}; var topGr = new GlideAggregate('x_lumis_cmdb_quest_event'); topGr.addAggregate('SUM', 'points_awarded'); topGr.addQuery('reversed', false); topGr.groupBy('user'); topGr.orderByAggregate('DESC', 'points_awarded'); topGr.setLimit(3); topGr.query(); data.leaders = []; var rank = 0; while (topGr.next()) { rank++; data.leaders.push({ rank: rank, user: topGr.user.getDisplayValue() + '', points: parseInt(topGr.getAggregate('SUM', 'points_awarded'), 10) }); } var totalPts = new GlideAggregate('x_lumis_cmdb_quest_event'); totalPts.addAggregate('SUM', 'points_awarded'); totalPts.addQuery('reversed', false); totalPts.query(); totalPts.next(); data.total_points = parseInt(totalPts.getAggregate('SUM', 'points_awarded'), 10) || 0; var eventCount = new GlideAggregate('x_lumis_cmdb_quest_event'); eventCount.addAggregate('COUNT'); eventCount.addQuery('reversed', false); eventCount.query(); eventCount.next(); data.event_count = parseInt(eventCount.getAggregate('COUNT'), 10) || 0; var awardCount = new GlideAggregate('x_lumis_cmdb_quest_award'); awardCount.addAggregate('COUNT'); awardCount.query(); awardCount.next(); data.award_count = parseInt(awardCount.getAggregate('COUNT'), 10) || 0; var userCount = new GlideAggregate('x_lumis_cmdb_quest_event'); userCount.addAggregate('COUNT', 'user'); userCount.addQuery('reversed', false); userCount.query(); userCount.next(); data.curator_count = parseInt(userCount.getAggregate('COUNT', 'user'), 10) || 0; var rels = new GlideAggregate('cmdb_rel_ci'); rels.addAggregate('COUNT'); rels.query(); rels.next(); data.relationships = parseInt(rels.getAggregate('COUNT'), 10) || 0; data;

CMDB Quest gamifies the everyday actions that make ServiceNow data healthier. Reclassify a CI, add a service relationship, resolve an incident, complete a catalog task — the system detects it and awards you points automatically.

Everyone is in by default. No sign-up, no opt-in, no role to request. The moment you make a qualifying contribution, you're on the leaderboard.
✨ How to earn points

Points are tiered by impact. Higher tiers reward higher-effort, higher-value actions.

TierActionPoints
Tier 1Operationalize an Application Service20
Tier 1Resolve a duplicate CI via Data Manager15
Tier 1Reclassify a CI to a more specific subclass10
Tier 3Complete a CMDB Health remediation10
Tier 2Add a service-layer relationship5
Tier 3Resolve an incident5
Tier 2Align a task to a service-layer CI3
Tier 2Refresh stale CI owner from inactive to active3
Tier 3Complete a catalog task3
Tier 3Assign owner to a brand new CI within 24h2

Daily caps apply per event type. Points reverse automatically if the underlying action is rolled back.

sys_update_xml.name: sys_script_include_c75d0b8293340310c856f82bdd03d64a
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_script_include"><sys_script_include action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><access>public</access><active>true</active><api_name>x_lumis_cmdb_quest.CmdbQuestEventDetector</api_name><caller_access/><client_callable>false</client_callable><description>CMDB Quest event detector — evaluates whether CMDB changes match active event types and awards points.</description><mobile_callable>false</mobile_callable><name>CmdbQuestEventDetector</name><sandbox_callable>false</sandbox_callable><script><![CDATA[var CmdbQuestEventDetector = Class.create();
CmdbQuestEventDetector.prototype = {
    initialize: function() {},

    detect: function(current, previous, action) {
        if (!current) return;
        var tableName = current.getTableName();
        var userName = current.sys_updated_by + '';
        if (this._isSystemAccount(userName)) return;
        var userSysId = this._getUserSysId(userName);
        if (!userSysId) return;
        var tables = this._getTableHierarchy(tableName);
        var et = new GlideRecord('x_lumis_cmdb_quest_event_type');
        et.addQuery('active', true);
        et.addQuery('table_target', 'IN', tables.join(','));
        et.query();
        while (et.next()) {
            if (this._matches(et, current, previous, action) && this._underDailyCap(userSysId, et)) {
                this._awardEvent(userSysId, et, current);
            }
        }
    },

    _getTableHierarchy: function(tableName) {
        var result = [tableName]; var visited = {}; visited[tableName] = true;
        var cur = tableName;
        while (cur) {
            var t = new GlideRecord('sys_db_object');
            t.addQuery('name', cur); t.query();
            if (!t.next()) break;
            var scId = t.getValue('super_class');
            if (!scId) break;
            var sc = new GlideRecord('sys_db_object');
            if (!sc.get(scId)) break;
            var scName = sc.getValue('name') + '';
            if (!scName || visited[scName]) break;
            visited[scName] = true;
            result.push(scName);
            cur = scName;
        }
        return result;
    },

    _matches: function(eventType, current, previous, action) {
        var name = eventType.getValue('sys_name') + '';
        if (name === 'CI Reclassified to Child Class') return this._isReclassToChild(current, previous);
        if (name === 'Service-Layer Relationship Added') return this._isServiceLayerRel(current);
        if (name === 'Task Aligned to Service Layer') return this._isTaskServiceAlignment(current, previous);
        if (name === 'Incident Resolved') return this._isIncidentResolved(current, previous);
        if (name === 'Catalog Task Completed') return this._isCatalogTaskCompleted(current, previous);
        return false;
    },

    _isReclassToChild: function(current, previous) {
        if (!previous) return false;
        var oldClass = previous.getValue('sys_class_name') + '';
        var newClass = current.getValue('sys_class_name') + '';
        if (oldClass === newClass || !oldClass || !newClass) return false;
        return this._isChildClass(newClass, oldClass);
    },

    _isChildClass: function(child, parent) {
        var visited = {}; var cur = child;
        while (cur && !visited[cur]) {
            visited[cur] = true;
            var t = new GlideRecord('sys_db_object');
            t.addQuery('name', cur); t.query();
            if (!t.next()) return false;
            var scId = t.getValue('super_class');
            if (!scId) return false;
            var sc = new GlideRecord('sys_db_object');
            if (!sc.get(scId)) return false;
            var scName = sc.getValue('name') + '';
            if (scName === parent) return true;
            cur = scName;
        }
        return false;
    },

    _isServiceLayerRel: function(current) {
        var p = current.getValue('parent') + '';
        return p ? this._isServiceLayerCi(p) : false;
    },

    _isServiceLayerCi: function(ciSysId) {
        var ci = new GlideRecord('cmdb_ci');
        if (!ci.get(ciSysId)) return false;
        var cls = ci.getValue('sys_class_name') + '';
        return ['cmdb_ci_service','cmdb_ci_service_auto','cmdb_ci_service_discovered','cmdb_ci_business_app','cmdb_ci_service_offering'].indexOf(cls) >= 0;
    },

    _isTaskServiceAlignment: function(current, previous) {
        if (!previous) return false;
        var oldCi = previous.getValue('cmdb_ci') + '';
        var newCi = current.getValue('cmdb_ci') + '';
        if (oldCi === newCi || !newCi) return false;
        if (!this._isServiceLayerCi(newCi)) return false;
        return !oldCi || !this._isServiceLayerCi(oldCi);
    },

    _isIncidentResolved: function(current, previous) {
        if (current.getTableName() !== 'incident') return false;
        if (!previous) return false;
        var newState = current.getValue('state') + '';
        var oldState = previous.getValue('state') + '';
        return newState === '6' && oldState !== '6';
    },

    _isCatalogTaskCompleted: function(current, previous) {
        if (current.getTableName() !== 'sc_task') return false;
        if (!previous) return false;
        var newState = current.getValue('state') + '';
        var oldState = previous.getValue('state') + '';
        return newState === '3' && oldState !== '3';
    },

    _underDailyCap: function(userSysId, eventType) {
        var cap = parseInt(eventType.getValue('daily_cap_per_user'), 10) || 5;
        var ts = new GlideDateTime();
        ts.setDisplayValue(ts.getDate() + ' 00:00:00');
        var ga = new GlideAggregate('x_lumis_cmdb_quest_event');
        ga.addQuery('user', userSysId);
        ga.addQuery('event_type', eventType.getUniqueValue());
        ga.addQuery('awarded_at', '>=', ts);
        ga.addQuery('reversed', false);
        ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
        ga.query(); ga.next();
        return parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT'), 10) < cap;
    },

    _awardEvent: function(userSysId, eventType, current) {
        var ev = new GlideRecord('x_lumis_cmdb_quest_event');
        ev.initialize();
        ev.user = userSysId;
        ev.event_type = eventType.getUniqueValue();
        ev.evidence_table = current.getTableName();
        ev.evidence_sys_id = current.getValue('sys_id');
        ev.points_awarded = parseInt(eventType.getValue('points'), 10) || 1;
        ev.awarded_at = new GlideDateTime();
        ev.insert();
    },

    _getUserSysId: function(userName) {
        if (!userName) return null;
        var u = new GlideRecord('sys_user');
        u.addQuery('user_name', userName); u.setLimit(1); u.query();
        return u.next() ? u.getUniqueValue() : null;
    },

    _isSystemAccount: function(userName) {
        return ['system','guest','glide.maint','app_creator'].indexOf(userName) >= 0;
    },

    type: 'CmdbQuestEventDetector'
};]]></script><sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-05-13 16:04:27</sys_created_on><sys_id>c75d0b8293340310c856f82bdd03d64a</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>CmdbQuestEventDetector</sys_name><sys_package display_value="CMDB Quest" source="x_lumis_cmdb_quest">d70efac293b00310c856f82bdd03d6e2</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="CMDB Quest">d70efac293b00310c856f82bdd03d6e2</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_script_include_c75d0b8293340310c856f82bdd03d64a</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-05-14 14:45:36</sys_updated_on></sys_script_include></record_update>
